default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Evolution HG product launch plan and timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Phased Launch:** A phased launch of Evolution Gold and API LPs begins this Friday, targeting affiliates first.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Messaging:** Position Evolution Gold as a market novelty, as this is its first public launch with a hosting partner.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**LP Review:** The team will send screenshots of the new LPs for Davidson's technical review to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**CRM Launch:** The CRM product launch is deferred to mid-April, aligning with Brius's "Evo Week" event.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

## Topics

### Product Launch Timeline

  - [The launch is a phased rollout of affiliate and organic LPs for Evolution Gold and Evolution API.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**Fri, Mar 20:** Affiliate LP → Evolution Gold](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Mon, Mar 23:** Affiliate LP → Evolution API](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**Tue, Mar 24:** Organic LP → Evolution Gold](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [**Wed, Mar 25:** Organic LP → Evolution API](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### LP Content & Messaging

  - [**Evolution Gold LP:**](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Audience:** Highly technical developers.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Focus:** Technical benefits like scalability and stability.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Content:** Comparison banner linking to the Evolution API page.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Evolution API LP:**](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Audience:** Technical users, but with a slightly simplified tone.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Focus:** Use cases and active integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Bundle Offer:** Deferred to a later phase due to technical complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [**Positioning:** Frame Evolution Gold as a market novelty, as this is its first public launch with a hosting partner.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Targeting:** The GTM plan aims to capture two segments:](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [New customers](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Existing VPS users in the community](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Promotion:** Fernando is pushing for an aggressive promotional campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Support & Documentation

  - [**Knowledge Base:** Ana requested documentation to create support materials.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Resource:** Davidson provided a link to the Brius documentation portal, which will be updated in real-time.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Content:** The portal includes docs for Gold, API, and a preview of CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**PMM Team:** Send LP screenshots to Davidson for technical review.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Davidson:** Review LP content for accuracy and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Ana:** Schedule a follow-up meeting for mid-next week to plan the CRM launch.](https://fathom.video/share/44hdCJxNyKGhd21_5jP-koSdsjdqj9h6?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

action_items.description: Share Evo Gold/API LP screenshots w/ Davidson via WhatsApp; request review
Schedule CRM follow-up w/ Davidson for mid next week
